title: rhodax ambiguus
side_effects: Rhodax ambiguus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can also cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Excessive use of Rhodax ambiguus can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of seizures and coma. Furthermore, improper use can also cause skin irritation, including redness and blistering, which may be irreversible in some cases.
